title: Refunds offset spend and cash withdrawals are spend by default
description: Assume an explicitly linked refund/reversal is on the same owned account and currency, has the opposite sign, and cumulative linked credits do not exceed the original outflow; the linked amount offsets the original transaction's active category. An unlinked credit is not a refund. A cash withdrawal remains External Spend unless linked to another tracked account. Validate representative examples in OQ-LEDGER-5.
